meaning: vt.修剪,砍伐,斩vi.下垂,闲荡adj.垂下的n.砍下的部分,垂耳兔
examples: We won the first game by a lop-sided score of 15 to 2.
It also maps x86 Linux system calls to LoP system calls.
I say, 'Maybe you could lop off the second floor entirely.'
The usual practice is to merely lop off some of the interest or principal owed.
They didn't have any width on the left-hand side so they were a little bit lop-sided.
